source.description: Six-panel contact sheet generated for a marker bubble-letter WOW doodle sequence, then cropped into lesson assets.
source.notes: Created as the June 13, 2026 honest backdated Doodlea.day archive lesson.

process_strategy: The frames keep the same WOW lettering layout while building guide letters, bubble outlines, inner counters, comic bursts, marker fills, highlights, and shadow in order.

final_elements.name: light WOW letter guides
final_elements.description: Loose block-letter guide shapes for W, O, and W across the same baseline.

final_elements.name: rounded bubble outlines
final_elements.description: Puffy marker-style outlines wrapped around the three guide letters.

final_elements.name: O center counter
final_elements.description: The open center hole inside the round bubble-letter O.

final_elements.name: thick black letter outline
final_elements.description: Bold black marker contour around the already formed bubble letters.

final_elements.name: comic burst marks
final_elements.description: Small sparkle and action marks around the word that stay outside the letters.

final_elements.name: pink and orange marker fill
final_elements.description: Bright warm marker color inside the letters with visible handmade strokes.

final_elements.name: white shine gaps
final_elements.description: Small uncolored shine shapes left on the letter tops.

final_elements.name: purple drop shadow
final_elements.description: A simple offset shadow behind the word that makes the lettering pop.

frames.visible_job: Adds light W O W guide letters across one baseline with enough space for bubble edges.
Wraps rounded bubble outlines around the letter guides and opens the O center counter.
Adds the thick black letter outline by tracing only the already placed bubble letters.
Adds small comic burst marks around the existing word without changing the letters.
Adds pink and orange marker fill, white shine gaps, and a purple drop shadow.

final_step.visible_job: Only reinforces the existing outline and burst marks, deepens the marker fills, and sharpens the shine and shadow.

rejection_checks: No letter shape, burst mark, color area, shine gap, or shadow should first appear in the final image.
No frame may ink, fill, shade, or clean a feature that was not already visible in an earlier frame.
No adjacent frame should look unchanged at card size.
The final image must keep the same WOW layout, scale, and placement as the step frames.
